void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-manual-branch-template&lbpmTmpId=route-manual-branch-lbpm" fdId="route-manual-branch-process" linesIndex="6" nodesIndex="4" notifyType="todo"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="开始" x="100" y="40"/> <manualBranchNode decidedBranchOnDraft="false" id="N35" name="人工决策" x="100" y="100"/> <manualBranchNode decidedBranchOnDraft="true" id="N36" name="起草人决策" x="100" y="140"/> <endNode id="N99" name="结束" x="100" y="180"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N35" id="L29" startNodeId="N1"/> <line endNodeId="N36" id="L44" name="上汽" priority="1" startNodeId="N35"/> <line endNodeId="N36" id="L45" name="上发" priority="2" startNodeId="N35"/> <line endNodeId="N36" id="L46" name="上辅" priority="3" startNodeId="N35"/> <line endNodeId="N99" id="L47" name="起草分支A" priority="1" startNodeId="N36"/> <line endNodeId="N99" id="L48" name="起草分支B" priority="2" startNodeId="N36"/> </lines> </process>
